cards.title: Retail Products
cards.content:
• Personal Accident (PA) Benefit Scale
• Householders Package (Mandatory Sections)
• Shopkeepers Package Policy
• Package / Umbrella Policy Concept

cards.title: 1. What is covered?
cards.content:
Only death/disability caused SOLELY by an accident (external, violent, visible). 
NOTE: Disease or natural aging is NOT covered.

cards.title: 2. Permanent Exclusions
cards.content: Suicide, self-injury, accidents under influence of alcohol/drugs.

cards.title: 100% CSI Payment
cards.content:
• Death
• Permanent Total Disablement (PTD)
• Loss of 2 Limbs / 2 Eyes (or 1 of each).

cards.title: Reduced Payments
cards.content:
• Loss of 1 Limb / 1 Eye: 50% CSI.
• Temporary Total Disablement (TTD): Weekly payment (1% of CSI) for max 104 weeks.

cards.title: Householders Policy
cards.content: An 'Umbrella' policy for home risks. CRITICAL: Section 1 (Fire) is COMPULSORY. Others are optional.

cards.title: Shopkeepers Policy
cards.content: For small retail shops. Covers Fire (mandatory), Burglary, Neon signs, and Fidelity Guarantee (employee fraud).

cards.title: Q1. Compensation for loss of one eye?
